src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Security configuration to use the new withDefaults() API for JWT resource server setup.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The previous method signature oauth2.jwt() is deprecated or removed in newer Spring Security versions, causing a compile error or requiring explicit default configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add static import for Spring Security's withDefaults customizer to support the updated API call.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The withDefaults() method is not available without the static import, leading to a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ module system restrictions on serializable fields.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: 'serialVersionUID' is not accessible from module java.base (or similar access restriction) because it is a private field in a different module, and Java 14+ requires @Serial to explicitly allow access to serializable fields.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 17+ enforces that serialVersionUID fields in serializable classes must be annotated with @Serial (or be effectively final and private static final long) to avoid compile-time errors or warnings treated as errors in strict builds.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE to Jakarta EE to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+; using the old Java EE namespace causes deployment failures or classloading errors because the container expects Jakarta EE annotations and descriptors.
